dialogue: This morning, you did something bad...
You were playing with the ball, and broke a window.
You were sent to detention at the library, where the teacher is waiting for you...
Oh dear, you're the little troublemaker who broke a window, aren't you?
Do not worry, this detention will not be too long.
Let's use this time for some learning!
You did quite well for a first time.
Let's continue with some more exercises!
Those questions were the warmup.
Let's see how you answer these.
Well done! You are getting a good hang of it!
This is more fun than writing lines, isn't it ?
Now, show me your improvements.
Such a good student! Maybe you will be out of detention sooner than expected
Let's move on to the next page of your exercise book.
You have been making a lot of progress already, good job!
You are quite the smart person!
These next exercises shouldn't be much of an issue to you.
How wonderful I'm impressed!
You have done quite well so far.
Your detention is almost over!
These last few questions will be the hardest one yet.
But I believe you can answer them!
Amazing! You have finished all the exercises I had.
I am very proud of you.
Your detention is over now, keep being a good student and congratulations!
